questionHtml:
A ball of mass (50 ± 1) g is moving with a speed of (25 ± 1) m s−1. What is the fractional uncertainty in the momentum of the ball?


A.  0.02

B.  0.04

C.  0.06

D.  0.08

meta.title: A ball of mass (50 ± 1) g is moving with a speed of (25 ± 1) m s−1. What is the fractional uncertainty in the momentum of the ball? A. 0.02 B. 0.04 C. 0.06 D. 0.08
